places.name: Pushkar
places.modernInfo: Only Brahma temple in the world. Pushkar Lake is one of 5 sacred lakes. Camel fair held every November.

scenes.title: Brahma's lotus creates the world
scenes.description: Brahma dropped a lotus flower from his hand while searching for a place to perform the Pushkar yajna. It fell here and the lake appeared instantly — Pushkar means 'lotus lake'.

scenes.title: Why there is only one Brahma temple
scenes.description: Brahma's wife Savitri cursed him that he would be worshipped nowhere except Pushkar — because he had married Gayatri without waiting for her. This is why Pushkar has the only Brahma temple on Earth.

places.name: Gaya — Brahma's Yajna
places.modernInfo: Hindus come here to perform Pind Daan (ancestral rites). Phalgu river flows below. Vishnupad Temple marks Vishnu's footprint.

scenes.title: Brahma performs the great yajna
scenes.description: Brahma performed a yajna here so powerful that whoever dies in Gaya attains liberation. The demon Gayasura was sacrificed here — his body became the sacred earth of Gaya.
